29328.name: Credit
29328.desc: This currency, used by the Interastral Peace Corporation to settle accounts with its customers, is now widely accepted as the hard currency for space travel.
29328.lore: "People run around fighting and trading for numbers in a terminal, but the truly precious cannot be bought."

125435.name: Tracks of Destiny
125435.lore: Your victory is secured by countless failures, and the small steps you have taken led you to the turning point of fate.

409960.name: Traveler's Guide
409960.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>20,000</nobr> Character EXP.
409960.lore:
Required reading for world exploration. Press the "Read" button to tune in to an attractive voice in a language you understand, telling you about the legendary encounters of renowned adventurers across different worlds as well as the precious wisdom and knowledge that they have gathered.

"All-new series of the Traveler's Guide, The Chef's Manual to Galactic Cuisine, is now available for purchase."
"For submissions, please connect to synesthesia beacon ERD-23θ to contact an Intelligentsia Guild representative. Method of payment can be arranged to your convenience."

409961.name: Adventure Log
409961.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>5000</nobr> Character EXP.
409961.lore:
A neatly organized collection of educational adventure notes containing countless illustrations and texts entailing adventures from beginning to end, as well as valuable information and survival-related techniques.

"Why not just digitize it and save it on a photolith disk? That'd be much more convenient."
"Advanced technology is far more fragile than you'd think when faced with stellar storms and neuron flow eruptions. Besides, I'm sure the author of this book wanted people to read it in the simplest of ways."

409962.name: Travel Encounters
409962.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>1000</nobr> Character EXP.
409962.lore:
A travel diary with messy handwriting and random content. It's not of much use to you.

"Dan Heng, hurry up and finish reading it so you can throw it away."

549210.name: Tatters of Thought
549210.desc: A memoria fragment of fleeting thought. Crude material used for enhancement.
549210.lore:
Within the Memory Zone, thousands of thoughts flutter like dust. Broken thoughts accumulate, serving as nourishment and components for memes.

"A fleeting thought may dissipate into thin air or amass into obsessions."
comeFrom: Dropped by enemies in Divergent Universe

589818.name: Starfire Essence
589818.desc: A mature heliobus that ran away after the Flaming Catastrophe War. Used to level up Traces moderately for Nihility characters.
589818.lore:
A mean and nasty heliobus that appears like a full flame.
The size of a heliobus's flame when it materializes indicates its strength. This torch-like heliobus has just tasted consciousness and is eager to devour its host's emotions and desires.

"Absorb their emotions and sway their wills..."

633151.name: Fragments of Impression
633151.desc: A memoria fragment of profound impression. Normal material used for enhancement.
633151.lore:
Within the Memory Zone, the form of memories float as fleeting glimmers of light, and only profound and memorable fragments can condense it crystals.

"Memory is not a mere replication of past sensations, but a reconstruction of past impressions."
comeFrom: Memory Zone Meme at Equilibrium Level 2 or higher
Dropped by enemies in Divergent Universe

673759.name: Heaven Incinerator
673759.desc: A beast-form heliobus that homogenized after the Flaming Catastrophe War. Used to level up Traces significantly for Nihility characters.
673759.lore:
An intelligent and powerful heliobus that has started to take the form of a beast.
The size of a heliobus's flame when it materializes indicates its strength. A large heliobus, having homogenized its numerous lesser peers, will gradually have a stable shape. These immortal beings can become so dangerous that they are considered calamities.

"Floods, fires, landslides, and thunderstorms..."

717092.name: Shards of Desires
717092.desc: A memoria fragment of obsessive desires. Advanced material used for enhancement.
717092.lore:
Within the Memory Zone, memoria of desires develops ceaselessly. It absorbs thoughts and impressions, nurtures magic mirrors of desires, and reflects the eerie shadows of memetic entities.

"Memory points to the past, while desire points to the future. To seek desires from memory will cause dreams to become inverted, and inner demons will naturally be born."
comeFrom: Memory Zone Meme at Equilibrium Level 4 or higher
Dropped by enemies in Divergent Universe

874345.name: Fiery Spirit
874345.desc: Feeble heliobus that scattered after the Flaming Catastrophe War. Used to level up Traces slightly for Nihility characters.
874345.lore:
An innocent, formless heliobus.
The size of a heliobus's flame when it materializes indicates its strength. This little heliobus is innocent and naive and may be easily consumed by more powerful heliobi.

"Formless, rootless, and roaming boundless..."

13392580.name: Vanquished Flow's Reticence
13392580.lore:
None remembered the sudden moment when the universe fell silent. The voice of thoughts dissolved. All shapes were recognized as identical pixels, captured by the anti-memetic web, transformed into a singular extrapolation.
Until it ceased to "speak."

"Core▀▄verdict▀▄█loop▄█▀entity▄me▀▄"

30159250.name: Radiant Prominence
30159250.desc: An alien crown left behind by the Noontide Gryphon. Can be used for Ascension of Fire characters.
30159250.lore:
In a radiant fairy tale, Georios once sought the light of the moon to aid in creation. Aquila refused their rival's request, yet silently watched on, casting a sun-like gaze upon the land.

"The dance of the zenith sun and the night moon brings forth a perfect eclipse."

ranks.name: When a Bud Readies to Bloom
ranks.descHash: The <u>Super Break DMG</u> multiplier provided by Talent to "Dance Partners" now applies to all ally characters, with "Dance Partners" additionally receiving a <nobr>#4[i]%</nobr> boost. After "Dance Partners" use an attack, additionally deals the attacked enemy targets a fixed amount of Toughness Reduction equal to <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr> of their Max Toughness (minimum <nobr>#2[i]</nobr>, maximum <nobr>#3[i]</nobr>). This effect can only trigger once per enemy target, and this trigger count resets after the enemy target receives a killing blow.

ranks.name: Fresh, Ethereal, and Beloved
ranks.descHash: When The Dahlia is on the field, decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>. When an enemy target enters the field, immediately inflicts "Wilt" on them, lasting for <nobr>#2[i]</nobr> turn(s).

ranks.name: Pity Its Petals Thin as Mist
ranks.descHash:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.

ranks.name: Pity Its Heart Gnawed by Worms
ranks.descHash: Increases the number of DMG instances dealt by Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <nobr>#3[i]</nobr>. Upon its use, the DMG taken by all enemy targets increases by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>, lasting for <nobr>#2[i]</nobr> turn(s).

ranks.name: Fallen, Decayed, and Despised
ranks.descHash:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

ranks.name: And Yet, Always, Deathly Beautiful
ranks.descHash: Increases Dance Partners' Break Effect by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>. When using Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, <u>advances the next action</u> of all "Dance Partners" by <nobr>#2[i]%</nobr>.

skills.descHash: Deals Fire DMG equal to #1[i]% of The Dahlia's ATK to one designated enemy.
skills.name: Fiddle... Fissured Memory

skills.descHash:
Deploys a Zone that lasts for #2[i] turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of The Dahlia's turn. Then, deals Fire DMG equal to #1[i]% of The Dahlia's ATK to one designated enemy and their adjacent targets.
While the Zone lasts, increases all allies' Weakness Break Efficiency by #3[i]%. Toughness Reduction taken by enemy targets while not Weakness Broken can also be converted into Super Break DMG.
skills.name: Lick... Enkindled Betrayal

skills.descHash:
Inflicts a "Wilt" state on all enemies, lasting for #2[i] turn(s). Then, deals Fire DMG equal to #1[i]% of The Dahlia's ATK, which is distributed evenly across all enemies.
Enemy targets in the "Wilt" state have their DEF reduced by #3[f1]% and will be implanted with Weakness of all Dance Partners' Types.
skills.name: Wallow... <nobr>Entombed Ash</nobr>

skills.descHash:
When entering combat, The Dahlia regenerates #4[i] Energy and becomes "Dance Partners" along with the teammate that triggered combat. Whenever there is no other "Dance Partner" on the field, this unit and the teammate with the highest Break Effect become "Dance Partners" together. After a "Dance Partner" attacks a Weakness Broken enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this attack will be converted into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at #5[i]%.
After an enemy target gets attacked by the other "Dance Partner," The Dahlia launches Follow-Up ATK and deals #2[i] instance(s) of DMG, each dealing Fire DMG equal to #1[i]% of The Dahlia's ATK to one random enemy. After each instance of DMG dealt to a Weakness Broken enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this DMG will be converted into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at #3[i]%.
This effect can only trigger once per turn. If the target is defeated before the Follow-Up ATK is used, it will be launched at one random enemy instead.
skills.name: Who's Afraid of Constance?

skills.descHash: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.
skills.name: Attack

skills.descHash:
After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for #1[i] second(s). Enemies within this dimension will not actively attack ally targets. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, The Dahlia immediately deploys her Skill's Zone, and converts the combat-triggering Toughness Reduction into 1 instance of Super Break DMG at #2[i]% against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
skills.name: The Heart Makes the Finest Tomb

embedBonusSkill.descHash: When entering combat, increases other characters' Break Effect by an amount equal to <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr> of The Dahlia's Break Effect plus <nobr>#3[i]%</nobr>, lasting for <nobr>#2[i]</nobr> turn(s). When The Dahlia receives healing or a Shield provided by a teammate, this effect triggers again, lasting for <nobr>#4[i]</nobr> turn(s). Cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.
embedBonusSkill.name: Yet Another Funeral

embedBonusSkill.descHash: When using Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, recovers 1 Skill Point for allies. For every <nobr>#1[i]</nobr> instance(s) of Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> used, this effect can trigger once.
embedBonusSkill.name: Lament, Lost Soul

embedBonusSkill.descHash: When an ally target adds Weakness to an enemy target, increases SPD by #3[i]% for #4[i] turn(s). If a Fire ally character has implanted a Weakness when using an attack, then after the attack, additionally deals a fixed amount of #5[i] Fire Toughness Reduction to every target implanted with Weakness. Also, regenerates Energy equal to #2[i]% of Max Energy. This effect can regenerate Energy up to #1[i]% of Max Energy.
embedBonusSkill.name: Outgrow the Old, Espouse the New

voiceItems.title: First Meeting
voiceItems.text: Your memories... are quite thorny. So, why don't we start with me laying my thoughts bare...? My name is Constance, and those who have fallen to my charms call me "The Dahlia." Don't be afraid. Come with me. In this duet belonging only to the two of us, you will learn how the past is being cremated and how the future is being buried...

voiceItems.title: Greeting
voiceItems.text: It's me. Did I scare you with how I... popped up without a sound?

voiceItems.title: Parting
voiceItems.text: How I wish I could preserve this moment as a frozen specimen, and keep it forever... Pity that this loveless fate insists on separating us. Oh well, let's save the blossoming for our next encounter. I only hope, by then, you'll still pique my interest...

voiceItems.title: About Self: Betrayal
voiceItems.text: I joined the Garden of Recollection out of my dislike for the unchanging Destruction. Soon after that, I grew tired of the rotten Remembrance and have been walking this universe as a Cremator ever since. Some say that it is in my instincts to betray, but I say that I enjoy the moment of "betrayal." Even if my heart bleeds in pain when I tear apart the shackles of fate, I still feel such an unparalleled delight...

voiceItems.title: Chat: Hands
voiceItems.text: Are you curious about my sharp right hand? It brings peaceful rest to life when its coldness slithers across a neck. While attending funerals, however, I'll don a veil and offer a withered flower with my other hand... the one that's never been stained with blood.

voiceItems.title: Hobbies
voiceItems.text: Isn't it fun... to role-play in someone's memory as an "Aunt" that had never existed? People are so trusting. Even in their final gaze upon me, they seem convinced they've suffered a tragic betrayal.

voiceItems.title: Annoyances
voiceItems.text: From the moment I became a memetic entity, no matter how much I sunbathe, this pallid skin never changes...

voiceItems.title: Something to Share
voiceItems.text: Do you still remember the Ever-Flame Mansion? In the Duke's memories, I was the child whom he always took the most pride in. I stirred up the flames of his ambition, and he fell on the road of the Destruction, only to create an opportunity for you to cross paths with the Nihility... A mere stoking is all it takes for the many "fates" in this cosmos to erupt into flames powerful enough to incinerate countless souls.

voiceItems.title: Knowledge: Memory Aesthetics
voiceItems.text: Wantonly editing memories or burning them all up without a second thought... That's how unbelievably banal my colleagues often are. But I like to wait. I wait for glorious things to fall into the past, for them to rot bit by bit like a pile of fallen petals, until they are covered with worms named lament and hatred. Then, under candlelight, I finally pick cherished mementos to be buried with them... The thought alone is intoxicating...

voiceItems.title: About Trailblazer
voiceItems.text: I see THEIR glances in your memories. I see all the choices you've made on your journey, as well as your lively and astonishing... essence. Without a doubt, I'll always, always... follow you and the steps you leave behind in the cosmos.

voiceItems.title: About Acheron
voiceItems.text: If I could dance with that enchanting lady, then perhaps I would bow before her charms. Ahh~ That would be so... SO beautiful...
voiceItems.unlockRequirement: Unlocked after completing the Finality Mission "That Which Shall Be"

voiceItems.title: About Black Swan
voiceItems.text: That arrogant woman? I may shy away from her pretentious airs, but as a Memokeeper, her ability to open doors for fate and create resplendent memories... is something I cannot help but admire.

voiceItems.title: About Firefly
voiceItems.text: The Stellaron Hunters are meant to be prisoners to the "script," yet she rebelled against fate time and time again... When will her blaze finally burn away the past which the Swarm has buried?

voiceItems.title: About Duke Inferno
voiceItems.text: His ambitions were doused by a sudden rain, and the glance of the <ruby>savior<rt>Nanook</rt></ruby> never descended. None will remember his death... except me. I do not remember him out of guilt or sorrow. I just... can't forget the look in his eyes when he finally learned the truth.

voiceItems.title: About Jade
voiceItems.text: Using a mere paper contract to bind two parties... Should I call it naivety, or does a poisonous serpent truly hide under that woman's petals? Perhaps that's why the strange fragrance one picks up when entangled with her... feels so irresistible.

voiceItems.title: Eidolon Activation
voiceItems.text: Pretty bold. What if... we both end up being burnt to ashes?

voiceItems.title: Character Ascension
voiceItems.text: The flame flickers ever stronger.

voiceItems.title: Max Level Reached
voiceItems.text: Time to consider when to move on to my next destination.

voiceItems.title: Trace Activation
voiceItems.text: Is it that hard to change our past?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Trailblazer
voiceItems.text: Step closer... that's the only way we'll find real accord.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Black Swan
voiceItems.text: To stand beside me is to court death at any time... though don't mistake this for a threat.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Firefly
voiceItems.text: How will you rebel against fate this time?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Acheron
voiceItems.text: Can I take your arm and awaken your memories?
voiceItems.unlockRequirement: Unlocked after completing the Finality Mission "That Which Shall Be"

voiceItems.title: Battle Begins: Weakness Break
voiceItems.text: Fallen for me already?

voiceItems.title: Battle Begins: Danger Alert
voiceItems.text: Your ashes must be beautiful...

voiceItems.title: Turn Begins 1
voiceItems.text: Any last words, sweetheart?

voiceItems.title: Turn Begins 2
voiceItems.text: The candle flickers... You're breathing fast.

voiceItems.title: Turn Idling
voiceItems.text: Don't make this boring for me...

voiceItems.title: Basic ATK
voiceItems.text: Look at me~

voiceItems.title: Skill 1
voiceItems.text: Immolate yourself in my dance!

voiceItems.title: Skill 2
voiceItems.text: Etch me into your bones!

voiceItems.title: Hit by Light Attack
voiceItems.text: This is getting fun.

voiceItems.title: Hit by Heavy Attack
voiceItems.text: Still the same old?

voiceItems.title: Ultimate: Activate
voiceItems.text: Memory's tomb has opened its maw...

voiceItems.title: Ultimate: Unleash
voiceItems.text: The moment when it all dies... is so beautiful.

voiceItems.title: Talent 1
voiceItems.text: Can't wait anymore?

voiceItems.title: Talent 2
voiceItems.text: You want to betray me?

voiceItems.title: Downed
voiceItems.text: Come... With me...

voiceItems.title: Return to Battle
voiceItems.text: Mmm. I missed you.

voiceItems.title: Health Recovery
voiceItems.text: You're such a good person.

voiceItems.title: Technique
voiceItems.text: Come, ignite memory~

voiceItems.title: Battle Won
voiceItems.text: Time to head to the next funeral.

voiceItems.title: Treasure Opening 1
voiceItems.text: Winning takes out all the fun.

voiceItems.title: Treasure Opening 2
voiceItems.text: Hmm. How would it... rot?

voiceItems.title: Precious Treasure Opening
voiceItems.text: At long last, my wait was worth something.

voiceItems.title: Successful Puzzle-Solving 1
voiceItems.text: Destroying it is also a solution, you know.

voiceItems.title: Successful Puzzle-Solving 2
voiceItems.text: How about something new and refreshing next time?

voiceItems.title: Enemy Target Found
voiceItems.text: Here comes a difficult dance partner.

voiceItems.title: Returning to Town
voiceItems.text: I wanna go sunbathe again. Come with me, will you?

storyItems.title: Character Details
storyItems.text:
The sweet dream burned down the Ever-Flame Mansion, taking with it every trace of "her."
Destruction, Remembrance... flowers of betrayal bloomed wherever they passed.
To return to the dreamscape no one remembers, who will be the one to set her aflame again?

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part I
storyItems.text:
She escaped from the deepest depths of The Abyss, burning away every memory tied to her existence.
Following the trail of scorched marks, we tracked her to this place, where the countless Garden of Recollection's mirrors reflected the silhouette of a lone girl.

"Memokeeper Dahlia, why did you betray the Garden of Recollection?"
She tapped her cheek with her claws, her smile reflecting the same curve across innumerable mirrors.
"I simply grew tired of it... just as I once betrayed the Destruction."

Her gaze swept across numerous reflections of herself in the mirrors.
"Yes... I have fallen into your mirrors. But doesn't this mean that when I set my memories ablaze, all these mirrors will burn along with me?"

She pranced into a strange dance, her skirt twirling simultaneously in thousands of reflections... The cold flames on her dress hem gently licked the mirrors' surfaces, before swallowing them into the fire.

In the reflections of the Garden of Recollection's mirrors, I saw that lady offer all her bouquets of memories to the raging flames. Her childhood burned to ashes, her youth turned to dust, and finally, all of her past...
And burning along with them, our myriad mirrors.

"Feeling hot and restless? Then step into the gentle flames with me..." Through the mirror ahead, she smiled at me.

I can no longer hear those cries... With joy in my heart, I step into the mirror, chasing after that dancing figure. As I followed her steps, then matched her rhythm, I finally grasped the hem of her dress...
And at last, she met my gaze. In the flickering light, her hands smoothed over the hem of my dress, and the blue of her eyes drowned all of me, like tender waves.

— A Memokeeper's memory

"The Memokeepers thought I surrendered all my past, but who said those memories were 'mine'?"
Toying with the flames on her tail, she walked toward the next memory.

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part II
storyItems.text:
"Constance... though not the eldest among the siblings, she was like our big sister. When teaching us, her tail was intimidating, but it never harmed us."
— The Scribe's memory

"When we learned the skills of 'Destruction' from Father together, Constance was the only one who mastered them the fastest, as if... she was recalling some long-forgotten instincts. Scary, isn't it... yet her voice remained so gentle."
— The Shacklebound's memory

"With her slender fingers, she would tune my strings and teach me to pluck passionate melodies. Ah... I know... though flames dance at her fingertips, her heart remains cold."
— The Tuner's memory

"Constance... my most ambitious and most excellent child. She needs not the flames of Destruction bestowed by me. She has long been ignited by the flames deep within her heart.

Such prodigious ambitions. The Ever-Flame Mansion favors members like her. I have no doubt that one day she'll grow tired of the Annihilation Gang's games. When that time comes, our Master will welcome her with open arms, for only the most violent destruction brings THEM joy..."
— Duke Inferno's memory

On the night when twilight rain fell, Caterina, Dubra, Akash... they vanished in the flames.
Yet she who is partial to conflagration did not set the mansion ruins ablaze, but gathered the memories from the embers...
"Father, for your death I shall mourn. I will become the smoldering flame beneath sweet dreams, embracing all that yearns."

Under the curtain of Nihility's rain, no one could make out her expression. Was she smiling, sobbing, or perhaps...

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part III
storyItems.text:
She said her name was Constance.
That was the first time I saw her. Wearing a white dress, she was fixing my hair as I had just woken up from the incubation pod.

She said her name was The Dahlia.
That was the second time I met her. During a mission, her white gloves wiped away blood stains off me... just like my sister used to do.

"Don't be afraid, I'll always be by your side."
She vanished into the depths of the sweet dream, leaving behind only a faint trace of floral fragrance.

The Planet of Festivities is full of eager Dreamchasers, yet she casually becomes a part of others' memories.
I follow the script's directions to take action, while she never took any of it seriously.

During this long banquet, she twirled along the musical stave of the Paths, seemingly unable to refuse any invitation...

She traverses through the Order's melody, yet can't resist touching the notes of Harmony. Listening to the hum of Propagation, and under destiny's playful whims, she willingly lets herself be swallowed by the shadows of Nihility, while deliberately or not... becoming entangled with the dance partner of Remembrance.

As always, her enthusiasm was intense, yet fleeting.
She said that only by putting her life on the edge of a blade could she truly feel the joy of being alive.
So, her gaze upon me was complex...
On her face, I saw pity for my inevitable death. I also saw delight, as if she had created another beautiful memory. Not to mention curiosity, to see how I would defy my destiny.

I asked her to burn away the Nameless' memories of the Finality, for those memories were far too dangerous.
With the flames from her tail, she set the Nameless' past ablaze. Yet, she smiled as she told me,
Nothing is ever truly forgotten, even through the most intense combustion.

Perhaps she has done this millions of times before.
She abandoned much, all because she was always searching for something.
Perhaps this is why she keeps attending banquet after banquet. Even as the attendees whisper and curse her as the symbol of mourning and decay. Few remember that mourning is a tribute to life, that withered things once had their moment of glory.
— A certain Stellaron Hunter's distorted memory

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part IV
storyItems.text:
If she were to be cast in the play of the Finality, among the confluence of countless possibilities, she would find ways to rebel in every single one.

The Stellaron Hunters hold too many secrets of the cosmos, and as she peers into these memories, the Destruction will one day cast THEIR gaze upon her.
Weary of her endless suffering journey, she hastens the coming of Finality by becoming the Overlord who destroys Remembrance, taking the name "Ephemera."

In one possibility, she would make everyone in the cosmos forget her ascension, as if the eighth Lord Ravager had never existed.
When time reaches its end, her flames will engulf the Eden of Blessed Insight, burning every trace of the universe's past to ashes. Thus, she declares to all Pure Children of Anāsrava that she will leave behind a tomb of the Remembrance for the cosmos.
...
Therefore, I rejected her request to join the Stellaron Hunters, to sever this raging possibility.

— Script Notes

"Remembrance, Destruction, Finality..."
With a smile and flowing skirt, she twirls ceaselessly.
In the end, she still doesn't know which destiny she should embrace, perhaps nothing will ever truly satisfy her...
"But this way, I'll never be Destiny's Slave."

As the dance ends, only echoes linger in the ashes.
"So let us fall in love again, rebel again, and cast ourselves into destiny's currents once more."

name: The Dahlia
descHash: The sweet dream burned down the Ever-Flame Mansion, taking with it every trace of "her." Destruction, Remembrance... flowers of betrayal bloomed wherever they passed. To return to the dreamscape no one remembers, who will be the one to set her aflame again?
